visual_summary: A grand, cavernous Martian council hall designed for ceremonial martial assemblies. The space functions as an imposing Thark audience chamber and a high-tension political arena, constructed of stone to accommodate large gatherings such as councils of Thark chieftains and prisoners.
layout_notes: Large scale; centered around a focal point for the presiding chieftain.
lighting: Dramatic and tension-filled; heavy atmosphere with shadows cast by large warriors.
mood: Heavy, dramatic, and high-tension; suitable for trials and sudden outbursts of violence.
constraints: Must accommodate large Thark warriors and chieftains
Lighting must support dramatic shadows and tension
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural ornamentation or decorative details are not defined.
Exact dimensions of the "cavernous" space are unquantified.
